name: Vail Country Club
about: Vail Country Club is a year-round golf and sports bar facility featuring two state-of-the-art TrackMan golf simulators with access to over 400 courses globally. The venue offers a full bar, eight large screen TVs, and hosts private events, parties, and golf leagues. Services include golf lessons with a PGA professional, TaylorMade club fittings, and various practice tools like the TrackMan Combine and Shot Optimizer to improve game performance.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to premium TrackMan technology with real-time shot data
Multiple amenities including a full bar, TVs, and event hosting capabilities
Comprehensive services from lessons and fittings to leagues and practice tools

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers rental clubs, including junior sets for children.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full bar and kitchen available for food and drink service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The winter league allows 2 hours per 9 holes, so 18 holes would take approximately 4 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and kids, offering junior rental sets and fun golf games for all ages.
